title: DEKTON 4-in-1 Telescopic Window Cleaning Kit with 8ft Long Reach Pole, Bendable Duster, Squeegee & Scrubber for High Windows, Ceilings & Conservatories
features: Effortless Long Reach: Our durable, telescopic pole extends from 39 inches to 96 inches (8 ft.), allowing you to safely and easily clean high windows, conservatories, and ceilings without the need for a ladder.

Streak-Free Squeegee: Achieve a professional, flawless finish on all glass surfaces with our high-quality squeegee, specifically designed to eliminate smears and watermarks for a crystal-clear shine every time.

Multifunctional & Versatile: This complete 4-piece set includes a robust telescopic pole, a streak-free squeegee, a multi-purpose scrubber, and a flexible chenille duster, providing a comprehensive solution for all your cleaning needs.

Tackles Hard-to-Reach Areas: The flexible and bendable chenille duster attachment effortlessly removes dust and cobwebs from corners, light fixtures, and ceiling fans, reaching where other cleaning tools cannot.
Lightweight & Easy to Use: Designed with user comfort in mind, the sturdy yet lightweight pole ensures fatigue-free cleaning, offering superior control and stability even at full extension.
description: The DEKTON 4PC Cleaning Kit is your all-in-one solution for a spotless home. This highly effective and versatile set is engineered to make high-level cleaning tasks simple and safe. Our kit is centered around a robust telescopic pole that provides an impressive reach of up to 96 inches (8 ft.), allowing you to clean second-story windows, conservatory roofs, and high ceilings with both hands firmly on the ground. The pole is lightweight and stable, directly addressing the frustrations some consumers have with heavy or unwieldy long-reach cleaners. The four-piece set includes the essential attachments you need for a spotless finish. The high-quality squeegee ensures a professional, streak-free shine on windows, glass, and mirrors, while the accompanying scrubber is perfect for tackling stubborn dirt and grime. For general dusting and cobweb removal, the bendable chenille duster provides a flexible, efficient solution for reaching into tight corners and around light fittings.

specifications_table.Included Components: 8ft. Telescoping pole, Squeegee, Scrubber. • Bendable chenille duster.
